title: Red Hat Security Advisory: RHSA 4.8.7 security and bug fix update
overview:
Updated images are now available for Red Hat Advanced Cluster Security
(RHACS), which typically include new features, bug fixes, and/or
security patches.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: RHSA 4.8.7 security and bug fix update

Updated images are now available for Red Hat Advanced Cluster Security
(RHACS), which typically include new features, bug fixes, and/or
security patches.

Updated images are now available for Red Hat Advanced Cluster Security
(RHACS), which typically include new features, bug fixes, and/or
security patches.



CVE-2025-59375: A memory amplification vulnerability in libexpat allows attackers to trigger excessive dynamic memory allocations by submitting specially crafted XML input. A small input (~250 KiB) can cause the parser to allocate hundreds of megabytes, leading to denial-of-service (DoS) through memory exhaustion.
